## Issue to Resolve

Add `Toggle auto advance` control/shortcut
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**

Sometimes during review you need to pause Auto Advance, unlike Anki desktop which I only click on shift+A to pause/resume the feature, on Ankidroid you need to exit the review session and toggle it, which is not practical at all.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A button to switch Auto Advance like the Enable/Disable whiteboard feature during review.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
x

x

 348→    override fun onCollectionLoaded(col: Collection) {
 349→        super.onCollectionLoaded(col)
 350→        if (Intent.ACTION_VIEW == intent.action) {
 351→            Timber.d("onCreate() :: received Intent with action = %s", intent.action)
 352→            selectDeckFromExtra()
 353→        }
 354→        // Load the first card and start reviewing. Uses the answer card
 355→        // task to load a card, but since we send null
 356→        // as the card to answer, no card will be answered.
 357→        prefWhiteboard = MetaDB.getWhiteboardState(this, parentDid)
 358→        if (prefWhiteboard) {
 359→            // DEFECT: Slight inefficiency here, as we set the database using these methods
 360→            val whiteboardVisibility = MetaDB.getWhiteboardVisibility(this, parentDid)
 361→            setWhiteboardEnabledState(true)
 362→            setWhiteboardVisibility(whiteboardVisibility)
 363→            toggleStylus = MetaDB.getWhiteboardStylusState(this, parentDid)
 364→            whiteboard!!.toggleStylus = toggleStylus
 365→        }
 366→
 367→        val isMicToolbarEnabled = MetaDB.getMicToolbarState(this, parentDid)
 368→        if (isMicToolbarEnabled) {
 369→            openMicToolbar()
 370→        }
 371→
 372→        launchCatchingTask {
 373→            withCol { startTimebox() }
 374→            updateCardAndRedraw()
 375→        }
 376→        disableDrawerSwipeOnConflicts()
 377→
 378→        // Set full screen/immersive mode if needed
 379→        if (prefFullscreenReview) {
 380→            setFullScreen(this)
 381→        }
 382→        setRenderWorkaround(this)
 383→    }

 631→    private fun toggleMicToolBar() {
 632→        tempAudioPath = generateTempAudioFile(this)
 633→        if (isMicToolBarVisible) {
 634→            micToolBarLayer.visibility = View.GONE
 635→        } else {
 636→            setEditorStatus(false)
 637→            if (!isAudioUIInitialized) {
 638→                try {
 639→                    audioRecordingController = AudioRecordingController(context = this)
 640→                    audioRecordingController?.createUI(
 641→                        this,
 642→                        micToolBarLayer,
 643→                        initialState = RecordingState.ImmediatePlayback.CLEARED,
 644→                        R.layout.activity_audio_recording_reviewer
 645→                    )
 646→                } catch (e: Exception) {
 647→                    Timber.w(e, "unable to add the audio recorder to toolbar")
 648→                    CrashReportService.sendExceptionReport(e, "Unable to create recorder tool bar")
 649→                    showThemedToast(
 650→                        this,
 651→                        this.getText(R.string.multimedia_editor_audio_view_create_failed).toString(),
 652→                        true
 653→                    )
 654→                }
 655→                isAudioUIInitialized = true
 656→            }
 657→            micToolBarLayer.visibility = View.VISIBLE
 658→        }
 659→        isMicToolBarVisible = !isMicToolBarVisible
 660→

 708→    override fun onCreateOptionsMenu(menu: Menu): Boolean {
 709→        Timber.d("onCreateOptionsMenu()")
 710→        // NOTE: This is called every time a new question is shown via invalidate options menu
 711→        menuInflater.inflate(R.menu.reviewer, menu)
 712→        menu.findItem(R.id.action_flag).subMenu?.let { subMenu -> setupFlags(subMenu) }
 713→        displayIcons(menu)
 714→        actionButtons.setCustomButtonsStatus(menu)
 715→        val alpha = Themes.ALPHA_ICON_ENABLED_LIGHT
 716→        val markCardIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_mark_card)
 717→        if (currentCard != null && isMarked(getColUnsafe, currentCard!!.note(getColUnsafe))) {
 718→            markCardIcon.setTitle(R.string.menu_unmark_note).setIcon(R.drawable.ic_star_white)
 719→        } else {
 720→            markCardIcon.setTitle(R.string.menu_mark_note).setIcon(R.drawable.ic_star_border_white)
 721→        }
 722→        markCardIcon.iconAlpha = alpha
 723→
 724→        val flagIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_flag)
 725→        if (flagIcon != null) {
 726→            if (currentCard != null) {
 727→                when (currentCard!!.userFlag()) {
 728→                    1 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_red)
 729→                    2 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_orange)
 730→                    3 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_green)
 731→                    4 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_blue)
 732→                    5 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_pink)
 733→                    6 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_turquoise)
 734→                    7 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_purple)
 735→                    else -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_transparent)
 736→                }
 737→            }
 738→            flagIcon.iconAlpha = alpha
 739→        }
 740→
 741→        // Anki Desktop Translations
 742→        menu.findItem(R.id.action_reschedule_card).title =
 743→            CollectionManager.TR.actionsSetDueDate().toSentenceCase(this, R.string.sentence_set_due_date)
 744→
 745→        // Undo button
 746→        @DrawableRes val undoIconId: Int
 747→        val undoEnabled: Boolean
 748→        val whiteboardIsShownAndHasStrokes = showWhiteboard && whiteboard?.undoEmpty() == false
 749→        if (whiteboardIsShownAndHasStrokes) {
 750→            undoIconId = R.drawable.eraser
 751→            undoEnabled = true
 752→        } else {
 753→            undoIconId = R.drawable.ic_undo_white
 754→            undoEnabled = colIsOpenUnsafe() && getColUnsafe.undoAvailable()

 757→        val undoIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_undo)
 758→        undoIcon.setIcon(undoIconId)

1011→    private fun updateScreenCounts() {
1012→        val queue = queueState ?: return
1013→        super.updateActionBar()
1014→        val actionBar = supportActionBar
1015→        val counts = queue.counts
1016→        if (actionBar != null) {
1017→            if (prefShowETA) {
1018→                launchCatchingTask {
1019→                    eta = withCol { sched.eta(counts, false) }
1020→                    actionBar.subtitle = remainingTime(this@Reviewer, (eta * 60).toLong())
1021→                }
1022→            }
1023→        }
1024→        newCount = SpannableString(counts.new.toString())
1025→        lrnCount = SpannableString(counts.lrn.toString())
1026→        revCount = SpannableString(counts.rev.toString())
1027→        if (prefHideDueCount) {
1028→            revCount = SpannableString("???")
1029→        }
1030→        // if this code is run as a card is being answered, currentCard may be non-null but
1031→        // the queues may be empty - we can't call countIdx() in such a case
1032→        if (counts.count() != 0) {
1033→            when (queue.countsIndex) {
1034→                Counts.Queue.NEW -> newCount!!.setSpan(UnderlineSpan(), 0, newCount!!.length, 0)
1035→                Counts.Queue.LRN -> lrnCount!!.setSpan(UnderlineSpan(), 0, lrnCount!!.length, 0)
1036→                Counts.Queue.REV -> revCount!!.setSpan(UnderlineSpan(), 0, revCount!!.length, 0)
1037→            }
1038→        }
1039→        textBarNew.text = newCount
1040→        textBarLearn.text = lrnCount
1041→        textBarReview.text = revCount
1042→    }

1096→        val timeboxMessage = resources.getQuantityString(R.plurals.timebox_reached, nCards, nCards, mins)

1098→            title(R.string.timebox_reached_title)
1099→            message(text = timeboxMessage)
1100→            positiveButton(R.string.dialog_continue) {}
1101→            negativeButton(text = CollectionManager.TR.studyingFinish()) {
1102→                finish()

1134→    private fun runStateMutationHook() {
1135→        val state = queueState ?: return
1136→        if (state.customSchedulingJs.isEmpty()) {
1137→            statesMutated = true
1138→            return
1139→        }
1140→        val key = customSchedulingKey
1141→        val js = state.customSchedulingJs
1142→        webView?.evaluateJavascript(
1143→            """
1144→        anki.mutateNextCardStates('$key', async (states, customData, ctx) => { $js })
1145→            .catch(err => { console.log(err); window.location.href = "state-mutation-error:"; });
1146→"""
1147→        ) { result ->
1148→            if ("null" == result) {
1149→                // eval failed, usually a syntax error
1150→                // Note, we get "null" (string) and not null
1151→                statesMutated = true
1152→            }
1153→        }
1154→    }

1337→    override fun onCardEdited(card: Card) {
1338→        super.onCardEdited(card)
1339→        if (prefWhiteboard && whiteboard != null) {
1340→            whiteboard!!.clear()
1341→        }
1342→        if (!isDisplayingAnswer) {
1343→            // Editing the card may reuse mCurrentCard. If so, the scheduler won't call startTimer() to reset the timer
1344→            // QUESTIONABLE(legacy code): Only perform this if editing the question
1345→            card.startTimer()
1346→        }
1347→    }
1348→
1349→    private val fullScreenHandler: Handler = object : Handler(getDefaultLooper()) {
1350→        override fun handleMessage(msg: Message) {
1351→            if (prefFullscreenReview) {
1352→                setFullScreen(this@Reviewer)
1353→            }
1354→        }
1355→    }
1356→
1357→    /** Hide the navigation if in full-screen mode after a given period of time  */
1358→    protected open fun delayedHide(delayMillis: Int) {
1359→        Timber.d("Fullscreen delayed hide in %dms", delayMillis)
1360→        fullScreenHandler.removeMessages(0)
1361→        fullScreenHandler.sendEmptyMessageDelayed(0, delayMillis.toLong())
1362→    }
1363→
1364→    private fun setWhiteboardEnabledState(state: Boolean) {
1365→        prefWhiteboard = state
1366→        MetaDB.storeWhiteboardState(this, parentDid, state)
1367→        if (state && whiteboard == null) {
1368→            createWhiteboard()
1369→        }
1370→    }
1371→
1372→    @Suppress("deprecation") // #9332: UI Visibility -> Insets
1373→    private fun setFullScreen(a: AbstractFlashcardViewer) {
1374→        // Set appropriate flags to enable Sticky Immersive mode.
1375→        a.window.decorView.systemUiVisibility = (
1376→            View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LAYOUT_STABLE // | View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LAYOUT_HIDE_NAVIGATION // temporarily disabled due to #5245
1377→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LAYOUT_FULLSCREEN
1378→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_HIDE_NAVIGATION
1379→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_FULLSCREEN
1380→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LOW_PROFILE
1381→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_IMMERSIVE
1382→            )
1383→        // Show / hide the Action bar together with the status bar
1384→        val prefs = a.sharedPrefs()
1385→        val fullscreenMode = fromPreference(prefs)
1386→        a.window.statusBarColor = MaterialColors.getColor(a, R.attr.appBarColor, 0)
1387→        val decorView = a.window.decorView
1388→        decorView.setOnSystemUiVisibilityChangeListener { flags: Int ->
1389→            val toolbar = a.findViewById<View>(R.id.toolbar)
1390→            val answerButtons = a.findViewById<View>(R.id.answer_options_layout)
1391→            val topbar = a.findViewById<View>(R.id.top_bar)
1392→            if (toolbar == null || topbar == null || answerButtons == null) {
1393→                return@setOnSystemUiVisibilityChangeListener
1394→            }
1395→            // Note that system bars will only be "visible" if none of the
1396→            // LOW_PROFILE, HIDE_NAVIGATION, or FULLSCREEN flags are set.
1397→            val visible = flags and View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_HIDE_NAVIGATION == 0
1398→            Timber.d("System UI visibility change. Visible: %b", visible)
1399→            if (visible) {
1400→                showViewWithAnimation(toolbar)
1401→                if (fullscreenMode == FullScreenMode.FULLSCREEN_ALL_GONE) {
1402→                    showViewWithAnimation(topbar)
1403→                    showViewWithAnimation(answerButtons)
1404→                }
1405→            } else {
1406→                hideViewWithAnimation(toolbar)
1407→                if (fullscreenMode == FullScreenMode.FULLSCREEN_ALL_GONE) {
1408→                    hideViewWithAnimation(topbar)
1409→                    hideViewWithAnimation(answerButtons)
1410→                }
1411→            }
1412→        }
1413→    }
1414→
1415→    private fun showViewWithAnimation(view: View) {
1416→        view.alpha = 0.0f
1417→        view.visibility = View.VISIBLE
1418→        view.animate().alpha(TRANSPARENCY).setDuration(ANIMATION_DURATION.toLong()).setListener(null)
1419→    }
1420→
1421→    private fun hideViewWithAnimation(view: View) {
1422→        view.animate()
1423→            .alpha(0f)
1424→            .setDuration(ANIMATION_DURATION.toLong())
1425→            .setListener(object : AnimatorListenerAdapter() {
1426→                override fun onAnimationEnd(animation: Animator) {
1427→                    view.visibility = View.GONE
1428→                }
1429→            })
1430→    }
1431→
1432→    @Suppress("deprecation") // #9332: UI Visibility -> Insets
1433→    private fun isImmersiveSystemUiVisible(activity: AnkiActivity): Boolean {
1434→        return activity.window.decorView.systemUiVisibility and View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_HIDE_NAVIGATION == 0
1435→    }
1436→
1437→    override suspend fun handlePostRequest(uri: String, bytes: ByteArray): ByteArray {
1438→        return if (uri.startsWith(ANKI_PREFIX)) {
1439→            when (val methodName = uri.substring(ANKI_PREFIX.length)) {
1440→                "getSchedulingStatesWithContext" -> getSchedulingStatesWithContext()
1441→                "setSchedulingStates" -> setSchedulingStates(bytes)
1442→                "i18nResources" -> withCol { i18nResourcesRaw(bytes) }
1443→                else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("unhandled request: $methodName")
1444→            }
1445→        } else if (uri.startsWith(ANKIDROID_JS_PREFIX)) {
1446→            jsApi.handleJsApiRequest(
1447→                uri.substring(ANKIDROID_JS_PREFIX.length),
1448→                bytes,
1449→                returnDefaultValues = false
1450→            )
1451→        } else {
1452→            throw IllegalArgumentException("unhandled request: $uri")
1453→        }
1454→    }
1455→
1456→    private fun getSchedulingStatesWithContext(): ByteArray {
1457→        val state = queueState ?: return ByteArray(0)
1458→        return state.schedulingStatesWithContext().toBuilder()
1459→            .mergeStates(
1460→                state.states.toBuilder().mergeCurrent(
1461→                    state.states.current.toBuilder()
1462→                        .setCustomData(state.topCard.toBackendCard().customData).build()
1463→                ).build()
1464→            )
1465→            .build()
1466→            .toByteArray()
1467→    }
1468→
1469→    private fun setSchedulingStates(bytes: ByteArray): ByteArray {
1470→        val state = queueState
1471→        if (state == null) {
1472→            statesMutated = true
1473→            return ByteArray(0)
1474→        }
1475→        val req = SetSchedulingStatesRequest.parseFrom(bytes)
1476→        if (req.key == customSchedulingKey) {
1477→            state.states = req.states
1478→        }
1479→        statesMutated = true
1480→        return ByteArray(0)
1481→    }
1482→
1483→    private fun createWhiteboard() {
1484→        whiteboard = createInstance(this, true, this)
1485→
1486→        // We use the pen color of the selected deck at the time the whiteboard is enabled.
1487→        // This is how all other whiteboard settings are
1488→        val whiteboardPenColor = MetaDB.getWhiteboardPenColor(this, parentDid).fromPreferences()
1489→        if (whiteboardPenColor != null) {
1490→            whiteboard!!.penColor = whiteboardPenColor
1491→        }
1492→        whiteboard!!.setOnPaintColorChangeListener(object : OnPaintColorChangeListener {
1493→            override fun onPaintColorChange(color: Int?) {
1494→                MetaDB.storeWhiteboardPenColor(this@Reviewer, parentDid, !currentTheme.isNightMode, color)
1495→            }
1496→        })
1497→        whiteboard!!.setOnTouchListener { v: View, event: MotionEvent? ->
1498→            if (event == null) return@setOnTouchListener false
1499→            // If the whiteboard is currently drawing, and triggers the system UI to show, we want to continue drawing.
1500→            if (!whiteboard!!.isCurrentlyDrawing && (
1501→                !showWhiteboard || (
1502→                    prefFullscreenReview &&
1503→                        isImmersiveSystemUiVisible(this@Reviewer)
1504→                    )
1505→                )
1506→            ) {
1507→                // Bypass whiteboard listener when it's hidden or fullscreen immersive mode is temporarily suspended
1508→                v.performClick()
1509→                return@setOnTouchListener gestureDetector!!.onTouchEvent(event)
1510→            }
1511→            whiteboard!!.handleTouchEvent(event)
1512→        }
1513→    }
1514→
1515→    // Show or hide the whiteboard
1516→    private fun setWhiteboardVisibility(state: Boolean) {
1517→        showWhiteboard = state
1518→        MetaDB.storeWhiteboardVisibility(this, parentDid, state)
1519→        if (state) {
1520→            whiteboard!!.visibility = View.VISIBLE
1521→            disableDrawerSwipe()
1522→        } else {
1523→            whiteboard!!.visibility = View.GONE
1524→            if (!hasDrawerSwipeConflicts) {
1525→                enableDrawerSwipe()
1526→            }
1527→        }
1528→    }
1529→
1530→    private fun disableDrawerSwipeOnConflicts() {
1531→        if (gestureProcessor.isBound(Gesture.SWIPE_UP, Gesture.SWIPE_DOWN, Gesture.SWIPE_RIGHT)) {
1532→            hasDrawerSwipeConflicts = true
1533→            super.disableDrawerSwipe()
1534→        }
1535→    }
1536→
1537→    override val currentCardId: CardId?
1538→        get() = currentCard!!.id
1539→
1540→    override fun onWindowFocusChanged(hasFocus: Boolean) {
1541→        super.onWindowFocusChanged(hasFocus)
1542→        // Restore full screen once we regain focus
1543→        if (hasFocus) {
1544→            delayedHide(INITIAL_HIDE_DELAY)
1545→        } else {
1546→            fullScreenHandler.removeMessages(0)
1547→        }
1548→    }
1549→
1550→    /**
1551→     * Whether or not dismiss note is available for current card and specified DismissType
1552→     * @return true if there is another card of same note that could be dismissed
1553→     */
1554→    @KotlinCleanup("mCurrentCard handling")
1555→    private fun suspendNoteAvailable(): Boolean {
1556→        return if (currentCard == null) {
1557→            false
1558→        } else {
1559→            getColUnsafe.db.queryScalar(
1560→                "select 1 from cards where nid = ? and id != ? and queue != " + Consts.QUEUE_TYPE_SUSPENDED + " limit 1",
1561→                currentCard!!.nid,
1562→                currentCard!!.id
1563→            ) == 1
1564→        }
1565→        // whether there exists a sibling not buried.
1566→    }
1567→
1568→    @KotlinCleanup("mCurrentCard handling")
1569→    private fun buryNoteAvailable(): Boolean {
1570→        return if (currentCard == null) {
1571→            false
1572→        } else {
1573→            getColUnsafe.db.queryScalar(
1574→                "select 1 from cards where nid = ? and id != ? and queue >=  " + Consts.QUEUE_TYPE_NEW + " limit 1",
1575→                currentCard!!.nid,
1576→                currentCard!!.id
1577→            ) == 1
1578→        }
1579→        // Whether there exists a sibling which is neither suspended nor buried
1580→    }
1581→
1582→    @VisibleForTesting(otherwise = VisibleForTesting.NONE)
1583→    fun hasDrawerSwipeConflicts(): Boolean {
1584→        return hasDrawerSwipeConflicts
1585→    }
1586→
1587→    override fun getCardDataForJsApi(): AnkiDroidJsAPI.CardDataForJsApi {
1588→        val cardDataForJsAPI = AnkiDroidJsAPI.CardDataForJsApi().apply {
1589→            newCardCount = queueState?.counts?.new ?: -1
1590→            lrnCardCount = queueState?.counts?.lrn ?: -1
1591→            revCardCount = queueState?.counts?.rev ?: -1
1592→            nextTime1 = easeButton1!!.nextTime
1593→            nextTime2 = easeButton2!!.nextTime
1594→            nextTime3 = easeButton3!!.nextTime
1595→            nextTime4 = easeButton4!!.nextTime
1596→            eta = this@Reviewer.eta
1597→        }
1598→        return cardDataForJsAPI

 36→/** Abstraction: Discuss moving many of these to 'Reviewer'  */
 37→enum class ViewerCommand(val resourceId: Int) {
 38→    SHOW_ANSWER(R.string.show_answer),
 39→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1(R.string.answer_again),

 90→    companion object {
 91→        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 92→            get() = Arrays.stream(entries.toTypedArray())
 93→                .flatMap { x: ViewerCommand -> x.defaultValue.stream() }
 94→                .collect(Collectors.toList())
 95→
 96→        fun fromPreferenceKey(key: String) = entries.first { it.preferenceKey == key }
 97→    }
 98→
 99→    val preferenceKey: String
100→        get() = "binding_$name"
101→
102→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
103→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
104→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
105→            collection.remove(element)
106→            collection.add(0, element)
107→            true
108→        }
109→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
110→    }
111→
112→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
113→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
114→            // do not reorder the elements
115→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
116→                return@BiFunction false
117→            }
118→            collection.add(element)
119→            return@BiFunction true
120→        }
121→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
122→    }
123→
124→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
125→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
126→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
127→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
128→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
129→    }
130→
131→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
132→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
133→        bindings.remove(binding)
134→        prefs.edit {
135→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
136→        }
137→    }
138→
139→    // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
140→    val defaultValue: List<MappableBinding>
141→        get() {
142→            // all of the default commands are currently for the Reviewer
143→            fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, modifierKeys: ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys.none()) =
144→                keyCode(keycode, Screen.Reviewer(side), modifierKeys)
145→            fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide) = unicode(c, Screen.Reviewer(side))
146→            return when (this) {
147→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1 -> listOf(
148→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_Y, CardSide.BOTH),
149→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.ANSWER),
150→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.ANSWER)
151→                )
152→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2 -> listOf(
153→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_X, CardSide.BOTH),
154→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.ANSWER),
155→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.ANSWER)
156→                )
157→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> listOf(
158→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
159→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
160→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
161→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER, CardSide.BOTH),
162→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
163→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
164→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
165→                )
166→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> listOf(
167→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
168→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
169→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
170→                )
171→                EDIT -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
172→                MARK -> listOf(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
173→                BURY_CARD -> listOf(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
174→                BURY_NOTE -> listOf(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
175→                SUSPEND_CARD -> listOf(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
176→                SUSPEND_NOTE -> listOf(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
177→                PLAY_MEDIA -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
178→                REPLAY_VOICE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
179→                RECORD_VOICE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
180→                SAVE_VOICE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_S, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
181→                UNDO -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
182→                REDO -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH, ModifierKeys(shift = true, ctrl = true, alt = false)))
183→                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
184→                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
185→                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
186→                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
187→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
188→                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
189→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
190→                SHOW_HINT -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
191→                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
192→                ADD_NOTE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
193→                else -> emptyList()
194→            }
195→        }

197→    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, screen: Screen, keys: ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys.none()): MappableBinding {
198→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), screen)
199→    }
200→
201→    private fun unicode(c: Char, screen: Screen): MappableBinding {
202→        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), screen)
203→    }
204→
205→    fun interface CommandProcessor {
206→        /**
207→         * @return whether the command was executed
208→         */
209→        fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean
210→    }
211→}

 89→
 90→    companion object {
 91→        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 92→            get() = Arrays.stream(entries.toTypedArray())
 93→                .flatMap { x: ViewerCommand -> x.defaultValue.stream() }
 94→                .collect(Collectors.toList())
 95→
 96→        fun fromPreferenceKey(key: String) = entries.first { it.preferenceKey == key }
 97→    }
 98→
 99→    val preferenceKey: String
100→        get() = "binding_$name"
101→
102→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
103→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
104→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
105→            collection.remove(element)
106→            collection.add(0, element)
107→            true
108→        }
109→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
110→    }
111→
112→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
113→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
114→            // do not reorder the elements
115→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
116→                return@BiFunction false
117→            }
118→            collection.add(element)
119→            return@BiFunction true
120→        }
121→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
122→    }
123→
124→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
125→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
126→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
127→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
128→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
129→    }
130→
131→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
132→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
133→        bindings.remove(binding)
134→        prefs.edit {
135→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
136→        }
137→    }
138→
139→    // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
140→    val defaultValue: List<MappableBinding>
141→        get() {
142→            // all of the default commands are currently for the Reviewer
143→            fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, modifierKeys: ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys.none()) =
144→                keyCode(keycode, Screen.Reviewer(side), modifierKeys)
145→            fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide) = unicode(c, Screen.Reviewer(side))
146→            return when (this) {
147→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1 -> listOf(
148→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_Y, CardSide.BOTH),
149→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.ANSWER),
150→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.ANSWER)
151→                )
152→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2 -> listOf(
153→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_X, CardSide.BOTH),
154→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.ANSWER),
155→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.ANSWER)
156→                )
157→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> listOf(
158→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
159→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
160→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
161→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER, CardSide.BOTH),
162→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
163→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
164→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
165→                )
166→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> listOf(
167→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
168→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
169→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
170→                )
171→                EDIT -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
172→                MARK -> listOf(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
173→                BURY_CARD -> listOf(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
174→                BURY_NOTE -> listOf(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
175→                SUSPEND_CARD -> listOf(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
176→                SUSPEND_NOTE -> listOf(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
177→                PLAY_MEDIA -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
178→                REPLAY_VOICE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
179→                RECORD_VOICE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
180→                SAVE_VOICE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_S, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
181→                UNDO -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
182→                REDO -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH, ModifierKeys(shift = true, ctrl = true, alt = false)))
183→                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
184→                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
185→                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
186→                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
187→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
188→                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
189→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
190→                SHOW_HINT -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
191→                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
192→                ADD_NOTE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
193→                else -> emptyList()
194→            }
195→        }

197→    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, screen: Screen, keys: ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys.none()): MappableBinding {
198→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), screen)
199→    }
200→
201→    private fun unicode(c: Char, screen: Screen): MappableBinding {
202→        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), screen)
203→    }
204→
205→    fun interface CommandProcessor {
206→        /**
207→         * @return whether the command was executed
208→         */
209→        fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean
210→    }
211→}

 348→    override fun onCollectionLoaded(col: Collection) {
 349→        super.onCollectionLoaded(col)
 350→        if (Intent.ACTION_VIEW == intent.action) {
 351→            Timber.d("onCreate() :: received Intent with action = %s", intent.action)
 352→            selectDeckFromExtra()
 353→        }
 354→        // Load the first card and start reviewing. Uses the answer card
 355→        // task to load a card, but since we send null
 356→        // as the card to answer, no card will be answered.
 357→        prefWhiteboard = MetaDB.getWhiteboardState(this, parentDid)
 358→        if (prefWhiteboard) {
 359→            // DEFECT: Slight inefficiency here, as we set the database using these methods
 360→            val whiteboardVisibility = MetaDB.getWhiteboardVisibility(this, parentDid)
 361→            setWhiteboardEnabledState(true)
 362→            setWhiteboardVisibility(whiteboardVisibility)
 363→            toggleStylus = MetaDB.getWhiteboardStylusState(this, parentDid)
 364→            whiteboard!!.toggleStylus = toggleStylus
 365→        }
 366→
 367→        val isMicToolbarEnabled = MetaDB.getMicToolbarState(this, parentDid)
 368→        if (isMicToolbarEnabled) {
 369→            openMicToolbar()
 370→        }
 371→
 372→        launchCatchingTask {
 373→            withCol { startTimebox() }
 374→            updateCardAndRedraw()
 375→        }
 376→        disableDrawerSwipeOnConflicts()
 377→
 378→        // Set full screen/immersive mode if needed
 379→        if (prefFullscreenReview) {
 380→            setFullScreen(this)
 381→        }
 382→        setRenderWorkaround(this)
 383→    }

 631→    private fun toggleMicToolBar() {
 632→        tempAudioPath = generateTempAudioFile(this)
 633→        if (isMicToolBarVisible) {
 634→            micToolBarLayer.visibility = View.GONE
 635→        } else {
 636→            setEditorStatus(false)
 637→            if (!isAudioUIInitialized) {
 638→                try {
 639→                    audioRecordingController = AudioRecordingController(context = this)
 640→                    audioRecordingController?.createUI(
 641→                        this,
 642→                        micToolBarLayer,
 643→                        initialState = RecordingState.ImmediatePlayback.CLEARED,
 644→                        R.layout.activity_audio_recording_reviewer
 645→                    )
 646→                } catch (e: Exception) {
 647→                    Timber.w(e, "unable to add the audio recorder to toolbar")
 648→                    CrashReportService.sendExceptionReport(e, "Unable to create recorder tool bar")
 649→                    showThemedToast(
 650→                        this,
 651→                        this.getText(R.string.multimedia_editor_audio_view_create_failed).toString(),
 652→                        true
 653→                    )
 654→                }
 655→                isAudioUIInitialized = true
 656→            }
 657→            micToolBarLayer.visibility = View.VISIBLE
 658→        }
 659→        isMicToolBarVisible = !isMicToolBarVisible
 660→
 661→        MetaDB.storeMicToolbarState(this, parentDid, isMicToolBarVisible)
 662→
 663→        refreshActionBar()
 664→    }

 711→        menuInflater.inflate(R.menu.reviewer, menu)
 712→        menu.findItem(R.id.action_flag).subMenu?.let { subMenu -> setupFlags(subMenu) }
 713→        displayIcons(menu)
 714→        actionButtons.setCustomButtonsStatus(menu)

 724→        val flagIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_flag)

 741→        // Anki Desktop Translations

 743→            CollectionManager.TR.actionsSetDueDate().toSentenceCase(this, R.string.sentence_set_due_date)
 744→
 745→        // Undo button
 746→        @DrawableRes val undoIconId: Int

 749→        if (whiteboardIsShownAndHasStrokes) {

1134→    private fun runStateMutationHook() {

1140→        val key = customSchedulingKey
1141→        val js = state.customSchedulingJs
1142→        webView?.evaluateJavascript(
1143→            """
1144→        anki.mutateNextCardStates('$key', async (states, customData, ctx) => { $js })
1145→            .catch(err => { console.log(err); window.location.href = "state-mutation-error:"; });
1146→"""
1147→        ) { result ->
1148→            if ("null" == result) {
1149→                // eval failed, usually a syntax error
1150→                // Note, we get "null" (string) and not null
1151→                statesMutated = true
1152→            }

1395→            // Note that system bars will only be "visible" if none of the
1396→            // LOW_PROFILE, HIDE_NAVIGATION, or FULLSCREEN flags are set.
1397→            val visible = flags and View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_HIDE_NAVIGATION == 0
1398→            Timber.d("System UI visibility change. Visible: %b", visible)

1439→            when (val methodName = uri.substring(ANKI_PREFIX.length)) {
1440→                "getSchedulingStatesWithContext" -> getSchedulingStatesWithContext()
1441→                "setSchedulingStates" -> setSchedulingStates(bytes)
1442→                "i18nResources" -> withCol { i18nResourcesRaw(bytes) }
1443→                else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("unhandled request: $methodName")
1444→            }
1445→        } else if (uri.startsWith(ANKIDROID_JS_PREFIX)) {
1446→            jsApi.handleJsApiRequest(
1447→                uri.substring(ANKIDROID_JS_PREFIX.length),
1448→                bytes,
1449→                returnDefaultValues = false
1450→            )
1451→        } else {
1452→            throw IllegalArgumentException("unhandled request: $uri")
1453→        }
1454→    }

1456→    private fun getSchedulingStatesWithContext(): ByteArray {
1457→        val state = queueState ?: return ByteArray(0)
1458→        return state.schedulingStatesWithContext().toBuilder()
1459→            .mergeStates(
1460→                state.states.toBuilder().mergeCurrent(
1461→                    state.states.current.toBuilder()
1462→                        .setCustomData(state.topCard.toBackendCard().customData).build()
1463→                ).build()
1464→            )
1465→            .build()
1466→            .toByteArray()
1467→    }

1469→    private fun setSchedulingStates(bytes: ByteArray): ByteArray {
1470→        val state = queueState

1483→    private fun createWhiteboard() {
1484→        whiteboard = createInstance(this, true, this)
1485→
1486→        // We use the pen color of the selected deck at the time the whiteboard is enabled.
1487→        // This is how all other whiteboard settings are
1488→        val whiteboardPenColor = MetaDB.getWhiteboardPenColor(this, parentDid).fromPreferences()
1489→        if (whiteboardPenColor != null) {
1490→            whiteboard!!.penColor = whiteboardPenColor
1491→        }
1492→        whiteboard!!.setOnPaintColorChangeListener(object : OnPaintColorChangeListener {
1493→            override fun onPaintColorChange(color: Int?) {
1494→                MetaDB.storeWhiteboardPenColor(this@Reviewer, parentDid, !currentTheme.isNightMode, color)
1495→            }
1496→        })
1497→        whiteboard!!.setOnTouchListener { v: View, event: MotionEvent? ->
1498→            if (event == null) return@setOnTouchListener false
1499→            // If the whiteboard is currently drawing, and triggers the system UI to show, we want to continue drawing.
1500→            if (!whiteboard!!.isCurrentlyDrawing && (
1501→                !showWhiteboard || (
1502→                    prefFullscreenReview &&
1503→                        isImmersiveSystemUiVisible(this@Reviewer)
1504→                    )
1505→                )
1506→            ) {
1507→                // Bypass whiteboard listener when it's hidden or fullscreen immersive mode is temporarily suspended
1508→                v.performClick()
1509→                return@setOnTouchListener gestureDetector!!.onTouchEvent(event)
1510→            }
1511→            whiteboard!!.handleTouchEvent(event)
1512→        }
1513→    }
